name: SpexCode
description: Game-controller → keyboard profile for the SpexCode web dashboard. Load it into a generic OS-level gamepad-to-keyboard remapper (AntiMicroX / JoyToKey / Steam Input). The remapper emits these as REAL OS keystrokes, so they drive the dashboard in the browser AND can trigger OS-level voice input (WeChat). Buttons use the W3C Standard Gamepad layout — translate to your tool's button names.
keepInSyncWith: spec-dashboard/src/keymap.js (SpexCode's keyboard keymap — there is NO runtime link; if you rebind a key there, edit this profile too)

mappings.action: cross into the focus node's session / open board
start a fresh session on the focus node (@)

voiceButton.comment: RESERVED for voice input / transcription toggle — change the button or the target freely. This emits a REAL OS hotkey (not a browser event), which is the ONLY way to trigger an OS-level voice IME. Default target = WeChat PC voice input's hands-free (start/stop) hotkey. A user with a different voice tool just changes 'target'.

target.note: WeChat 2026 PC voice input: Windows hold = Ctrl+Win, hands-free toggle = Ctrl+Win+Shift; Mac hold = Fn, continuous = Ctrl+Fn. All customizable in WeChat 设置-快捷键. Fn on Mac is special — some remappers cannot emit it; use the Windows machine or a custom WeChat hotkey if so.
